title: Automated immunodetection of proteinase-K-resistant Lewy Pathology in FFPE human colon tissue
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3bccv","text":"Automated detection of gut Lewy Pathology using Leica Bond RX processor based on Protocol F using Bond Polymer Refine Detection kit (Leica Biosystems, Cat#: DS9800). Adapted from \"Method 5\" as described in Beach TG et al., J Parkinsons Dis. 2016.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4vf73","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"9a15g","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9vcc1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fmjuj","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"dl534","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6qg3a","text":"Acknowledgments","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3e5a","text":"We are grateful to the Banner Sun Health Research Institute Brain and Body Donation Program of Sun City, Arizona, for the provision of human colon tissue and data. steps: Leica Bond RX routine factory based “Bake and Dewax” protocol. Dewax Solution Leica Biosystems Catalog #AR9222

Enzyme Antigen Retrieval : Incubate in Enzyme 1 solution for 00:15:00 at 37 °C BOND Enzyme Pretreatment Kit Leica Biosystems Catalog #AR9551 For comparison, this step can be replaced with Heat Induced Antigen Retrieval using ER1 buffer for 00:20:00 Epitope Retrieval Solution 1 BOND Leica Biosystems Catalog #AR9961
Incubate in Bond Wash buffer three times 00:00:00 each. BondTM Wash Solution 10X Concentrate Leica Biosystems Catalog #AR9590
Primary antibody: Incubate in 1:10,000 Anti-Alpha-synuclein (phospho S129) antibody [MJF-R13 (8-8)] Abcam Catalog #AB168381 for 01:00:00 at Room temperature
Incubate in Bond Wash buffer three times 00:00:00 each. BondTM Wash Solution 10X Concentrate Leica Biosystems Catalog #AR9590
Incubate with labeled polymer 00:10:00 EnVision System-HRP, Labelled Polymer (Rabbit) Agilent Technologies Catalog #K4003
Incubate in Bond Wash buffer three times 00:02:00 each.
Incubate in Bond Wash buffer five times 00:00:00 each.
Incubate with Mixed DAB Refine for 00:00:00 followed by Mixed DAB Refine for 00:10:00 .
Deionized water wash for three times 00:00:00 each.
Incubate in Bond Wash buffer three times 00:00:00 each.
Slides are dehydrated in series of alcohols, cleared with Histo-Clear National Diagnostics Catalog #HS2001GLL and mounted with Chemical Permount Mounting Medium Fisher Scientific Catalog #SP15-100
creator: Elizabeth Videlock
